compiled_state.title: Create shared behavioral testing standard prompt fragment
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Create the shared behavioral testing standard as a prompt fragment at plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/behavioral-testing-standard.md.

The standard contains 4 sequential rules (from TESTING_RESEARCH.md and TESTING_SESSION.md):
1. **Before writing** — check for existing coverage. Search for tests that already exercise the behavior.
2. **What to test** — Given/When/Then format. One test, one behavior. No internal method names in test assertions. Test observable outcomes.
3. **How to test** — Execute code under test. Assert on output, exit code, or side effects. Never read source files as assertions. Mock only external boundaries.
4. **After writing** — Refactoring litmus test. Would this test break if someone renamed an internal variable? If yes, the test is a change-detector — rewrite it.

### File Impact
- `plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/behavioral-testing-standard.md` — Create

## Testing Mode
RED

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Prompt fragment exists at expected path
  Verify: test -f plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/behavioral-testing-standard.md
- [ ] Contains 4 sequential rules
  Verify: grep -c "Rule\|rule\|Before writing\|What to test\|How to test\|After writing" plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/behavioral-testing-standard.md | awk '{exit ($1 < 4)}'
- [ ] References refactoring litmus test
  Verify: grep -qi "refactoring" plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/behavioral-testing-standard.md
